title: Shopping for New Clothes
opening: Hi there! Can I help you find anything today?

t1.prompt: Hi there! Can I help you find anything today?
t1.promptTranslation: Hi there! Can I help you find anything today?

t_browse.prompt: Alright, feel free to look around! Let me know if you change your mind or need any assistance.
t_browse.promptTranslation: Alright, feel free to look around! Let me know if you change your mind or need any assistance.

t2_item_type.prompt: Okay, what kind of item are you looking for? We have shirts, dresses, jackets, and pants.
t2_item_type.promptTranslation: Okay, what kind of item are you looking for? We have shirts, dresses, jackets, and pants.

t3_size_color_try.prompt: Great! Do you have a size and color in mind? I have a lovely blue medium one in stock. Would you like to try it on?
t3_size_color_try.promptTranslation: Great! Do you have a size and color in mind? I have a lovely blue medium one in stock. Would you like to try it on?

t3b_suggest_another.prompt: No problem. How about a red large one? Or would you prefer to see something else entirely?
t3b_suggest_another.promptTranslation: No problem. How about a red large one? Or would you prefer to see something else entirely?

t4_after_try.prompt: How did it fit? Did you like it?
t4_after_try.promptTranslation: How did it fit? Did you like it?

t5_payment_returns.prompt: Wonderful! I'll ring that up for you. Will you be paying by card or cash? Our return policy allows exchanges or full refunds within 30 days with the receipt. Just make sure it's unworn.
t5_payment_returns.promptTranslation: Wonderful! I'll ring that up for you. Will you be paying by card or cash? Our return policy allows exchanges or full refunds within 30 days with the receipt. Just make sure it's unworn.

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, could you please repeat that? I didn't quite catch it.
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, could you please repeat that? I didn't quite catch it.

t-end.prompt: Great! Have a wonderful day and enjoy your new clothes!
t-end.promptTranslation: Great! Have a wonderful day and enjoy your new clothes!
